Please select the appropriate PR template by clicking on one of the links below:

- [Bug Fix Template](?expand=1&template=fix.md) - For bug fixes and patches
- [Documentation Template](?expand=1&template=docs.md) - For documentation updates
- [Chore Template](?expand=1&template=chore.md) - For maintenance tasks and refactoring
- [Breaking Change Template](?expand=1&template=breaking.md) - For breaking changes

Or delete this template and use the appropriate one below:
-->

## Type of Change
<!-- Please select one -->
- [ ] feat: New feature or enhancement
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation update
- [ ] chore: Maintenance, refactoring, or tooling
- [ ] breaking: Breaking change

## Description
<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of your changes -->

## Related Issues
<!-- Link any related issues using #issue_number -->
- Closes #
- Related to #

## Testing
<!-- Describe how you tested your changes -->
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project coding standards
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (if applicable)
